name: Jalapeno Poppers
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Grated Pepper Jack & Cheddar Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Leave the stems on! Cut a narrow slit along one side and scoop out the seeds and ribs.
2. Blanch the peppers, cool them, then stuff with the cheese mixture.
3. Freeze the stuffed peppers for a minimum of one hour.
4. Using the stems as a handle, coat the peppers in the batter.
5. Drop the peppers into a deep fat fryer one at a time until golden and crispy.
6. Let the peppers cool for 5 minutes before serving.
